exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close=Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flat_days, COUNT(*) as total_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('IXIC','GSPTSE','NYA') AND Date BETWEEN '2018-01-01' AND '2018-12-31' GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN Close>Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as up_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close<Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as down_days, SUM(CASE WHEN Close=Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flat_days, COUNT(*) as total_days FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('IXIC','GSPTSE','NYA') AND Date BETWEEN '2018-01-01' AND '2018-12-31' GROUP BY "Index";

result.preview: "Indices with more up days than down days in 2018: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite) \u2014 44 up days, 31 down days; GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite) \u2014 44 up days, 41 down days. (NYA had 36 up days and 42 down days.)"

args.answer: Indices with more up days than down days in 2018: IXIC (NASDAQ Composite) — 44 up days, 31 down days; GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite) — 44 up days, 41 down days. (NYA had 36 up days and 42 down days.)
